designTheme.designMd: Dark-first "bold stadium" design language. Background stadium-black #0b0f0d, cards #131a16, primary neon lime #b6ff3c, text-on-lime near-black #08120a, off-white text #e8f0ea, muted #8fa397. Condensed jersey display caps (Bebas Neue vibe) for hero titles, section titles, and big stat numbers (scoreboard feel); Geist for body; mono for addresses/amounts. Radius 0.625rem. Subtle lime glow on hero cards. Spanish (rioplatense) copy. Football/matchday energy. DESKTOP device.
